criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Presence and sophistication of AI features such as personalized insights, predictive analysis, automated savings, and smart investment recommendations.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert reviews

criteria.name: User Ratings & Reviews
criteria.description: Average user rating and sentiment analysis of user reviews on app stores (e.g., Apple App Store, Google Play Store).
criteria.sources: Apple App Store, Google Play Store

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Security measures implemented by the app, including encryption, two-factor authentication, and data privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, security audits, privacy policies

criteria.name: Range of Financial Tools
criteria.description: Breadth of financial tools offered, including budgeting, investment management, debt tracking, and expense monitoring.

criteria.name: Cost & Subscription Model
criteria.description: Pricing structure of the app, including free tiers, subscription fees, and any hidden costs.
criteria.sources: App pricing information, terms of service
